description: Rewrite strategy types and expected evidence classification for Rewrite Corpus entries.

rewrite_strategy_types.name: Qualify
rewrite_strategy_types.description: Replace absolute or unsubstantiated wording with qualified typical-results language.

rewrite_strategy_types.name: Remove
rewrite_strategy_types.description: Remove non-compliant claim wording from ad copy.

rewrite_strategy_types.name: Disclose
rewrite_strategy_types.description: Add disclosure, disclaimer, or contextual clarification without changing core product claims.

rewrite_strategy_types.name: Cite Evidence
rewrite_strategy_types.description: Require substantiation or certification reference before publishing the claim.

expected_evidence_types.description: No substantiation artifact expected for this rewrite guidance.
Certification mark, patent, award, or third-party credential.
Laboratory test report or method validation document.
General substantiation file supporting efficacy or performance claims.
Documented test method aligned with on-pack performance specifications.
